name: The First National Bank Of Waverly
description_short: The First National Bank of Waverly is a full-service community bank offering personal and business checking/savings accounts, CDs, IRAs, loans, debit cards, and insurance products.
description_long: The First National Bank of Waverly operates as a traditional community bank with NMLS #503801 and FDIC-insured deposits. Based on their website, they have been serving customers with a focus on both personal and business banking needs since at least 2019. The bank emphasizes convenience and competitive rates across their product lineup. The First National Bank of Waverly offers a comprehensive range of personal banking products including multiple checking account types (Regular, Senior, NOW, and Hero accounts), personal savings accounts with quarterly interest compounding, and certificates of deposit with flexible terms and automatic renewal options. They provide both traditional and Roth IRAs for retirement planning. On the lending side, they advertise personal loans with low interest rates, business accounts for commercial customers, and various credit products. Additional services include MasterCard debit cards with 24-hour ATM access, insurance products, and safe deposit boxes. What distinguishes The First National Bank of Waverly is their specific focus on underserved customer segments—particularly seniors (age 65+) with fee-waived Senior Checking accounts and military/first responders through their Hero Checking program, which includes discounts on mortgage processing, auto loans, and safe deposit box fees. Their product structure reflects an older, traditional banking model with monthly statements and branch-based relationships rather than a digital-first approach. The bank operates physical locations and maintains phone lines for customer service (740-947-2136 for rates, 1-800-523-4175 for debit card issues). However, the website content is limited and appears dated (copyright 2019), providing minimal detail about current rates, comprehensive service offerings, or digital banking capabilities. Customer reviews and third-party verification of services are not available in the provided materials. For consumers seeking a traditional community bank with military and senior discounts, First National Bank of Waverly may be suitable, though limited online information makes thorough evaluation difficult. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal Checking Accounts (Regular, Senior, NOW, Hero)
Personal Savings Accounts with quarterly interest compounding
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with flexible terms and automatic renewal
Traditional and Roth Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs)
Business Banking Accounts for commercial customers
Personal Loans with low interest rates
MasterCard Debit Cards with 24-hour ATM access
Bill Pay Services (mentioned for Hero Checking)
pros: Senior Checking account with no monthly fees regardless of balance (age 65+)
Hero Checking program for military (active/retired/enlisted) and first responders with no monthly service charge and multiple discounts
Discount on mortgage processing fees for Hero account holders
Discount on auto loan rates for Hero account holders
CDs with competitive rates, flexible terms, and automatic renewal at maturity
Both traditional and Roth IRA options with tax benefits
24-hour ATM/debit card access with MasterCard acceptance
cons: Regular Checking has $6/month fee if balance drops below $500
NOW accounts require $1,000 minimum deposit and charge $10/month unless maintaining balance
Website appears outdated (copyright 2019) with limited current information on rates and services
No indication of digital banking platform details or mobile app capabilities
Dormant account fees of $10/month after 1 year of inactivity across all account types
best_for: Seniors age 65 and older seeking fee-free checking with local community bank service
Active military, retired military, and first responders looking for account discounts and lower loan rates
Customers seeking traditional banking with physical branch locations and monthly statements
Savers interested in CDs and IRAs through a community bank with competitive rates
diagnosis: The First National Bank of Waverly is best suited for community-oriented customers, particularly seniors and military/first responders, who prefer traditional banking relationships with physical branches and are willing to maintain minimum balances. The main caveat is the limited online presence and outdated website information, making it difficult to verify current rates, digital capabilities, and comprehensive service details—prospective customers should contact the bank directly at 740-947-2136 or visit a branch for accurate current information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
